title: Turkish Chickpea Pide
description: A flavorful Turkish flatbread filled with chickpeas and spices. Perfect for a satisfying snack or meal.

ingredients.name: pide dough
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: turkish spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of paprika, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Roll out the pide dough on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Brush 1 tablespoon of the olive oil over the dough, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
In a bowl, mix together the chickpeas, turkish spices, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the chickpea mixture over the dough, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over the chickpeas.
If using feta cheese, sprinkle it over the chickpeas.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling to form a crust.
Brush the crust with a little water and sprinkle with sesame seeds (if desired).
Bake the pide for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the pide from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
